titleStmt.title: SII 15.531: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 531. (B.K. No. 242 of 1927-28.) SHIRŪR, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Siddhēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 990, Kīlaka. The other details are not given. The Śaka with the cyclic year corresponds to 1068-69 A.D.

It records a gift of land to the god Siddhadēva of Karṇana Sirivura, by Dēvarāyanāyaka of Nimba-kula, the Prathu of Kollāpura. It mentions Gaurakabbe, a devotee of the goddess Mahālakshmī of Kollāpura. In a lengthy praśasti associated with this goddess, She is described as Siṁhavāhane (i.e., seated on a lion), Rudrārdhāṅgōttuṅganivāsinī (i.e., dwelling higher up in the half body of Rudra) and supreme among the deities of the Mahātīrtha and Ādipīṭha, (i.e., foremost Śaktipīṭha), surrounded by seven hundred tīrthas headed by Śrī-Vīśālā, and the assembly of sixty-four Yōginīs and Siddhas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastyana�kāḷābha ntaratamandhakāraniyāmayōtpattimahāsaktisvarūpasamudbūta trijagadvyāptikīrttisaptakaḷpa
madvisāṣṭaguṇōpēta Aṣṭāviṁsayugāvatāra paramaudārikamahāmūrtti vrahmā rādhane siṁhavā
hane jaṁbūdvīpāntarggatasēvākṣētramahāpātakavināsini rudrārddhāṁgōttuṁga nivāsini śrī viṣāḷādisapta
satatīrttha catuṣṣaṣṭiyōginīsiddhasandōhaparivēṣṭita mahātīrtthādipī�dēvādhidēvi śrīmanmahālakṣmīdēviya
ra divyaśrīpādapadmōpajīviyarappa śrīmadabba gaurakabbegaḷu samastadustarārāti vistīrṇnajaḻadhimathanōpalabdha
vijayaśrīkānte parabaḷakritānte nijabhujōpārjita mahimāvaṣṭaṁbha cāturjya śrī sarōvararā
jahaṁsa sarasvatīkarṇnāvataṁsaṁ niṁbakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa vairibhēruṇḍaṁ caladaṁkarāma sāhasabhīma hayavatsarāja
gaṇikāmanōja haracaraṇakamaḷabhṛṁga bhāvanasiṁga śrīmanmahālakṣmīdēvyā varaprasāda caṁpa baṁṭa
rabāva nāmādi samastaprasastisahita śrīmatkollāpurada prabhu dēvarāyanāyakar karṇnana sirivura
siddha dēvargge sakavarṣa 990 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarad�śrāheyoḷ gelu
taḷa pannasa geyi modalāge kiruviṭṭegaḷgamīva bhomiya kōla dayageydu koṭṭar
Idanaḷidaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷpārvvarumaṁ kavileyuṁ koṁda pātakarappar . svadatta paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.531 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
